reviews.review_description: Very relaxing to do puzzles while listening to music. One of the best apps currently available in the the go store.  The developers response to my questions were prompt and right on!
A great 3d vr puzzle game

Puzzle game, very well crafted and polished, love moving the sphere over my head and watching puzzle pieces close :-) visuals and sound are great as well as the handling with the puzzle pieces.
One small thing : Arranging the pieces a bit higher would prevent staring downwards while playing seated,

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and giving feedback and I'm pleased to hear you are enjoying it. There is a toolbar to the left of the jigsaw tray that lets you move it to the left or right and resize it. When in the left and right positions it also raises the tray, so it may be worth seeing if you prefer those positions. I tend to reduce the size when placed to the side so that the tray obscures less of the background.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game, a new way to enjoy jigsaws! Music is great, very relaxing, and having the chance to add more pictures is a great addition. I think too the board should be a bit higher, or even be able to move it where I want. Also more achievements would be good. Anyway, the game is great and deserves 5 stars!

I didn't expect much from a jigsaw puzzle app but I'm positively surprised. There are so many low quality games in the store and this is definitely not one of them. It's very polished and well-conceived with easy controls that you can learn within seconds. The best thing is that you can add your own panoramas so you will never run out of content. This feature is extra awesome because I recently got into 360 photography and this is a nice relaxing way to enjoy my pictures even more. 5/5
Never done puzzle in my life but  brought this after trying demo and  just loved how easy controls are very relaxing experience  recomended
Love this game, Great way to Relax.

I’ve never gotten much pleasure from jigsaw puzzles, but I was curious how a VR version would look so I purchased what turns out to be one of the most enjoyable games in the Oculus Go store. Extremely well designed and creatively conceived gameplay for the Go.
Enjoyable experience, but would be perfect if it could be played lying down, by being able to adjust the position of the puzzle and the location of the pieces to grab
This works great on the Oculus Go.  Nice graphics and calming music which you can mute if you prefer.  It is very relaxing and a great way to just chill if you have a little time to kill.

This is so Awesome! I love doing jigsaw puzzles. Doing them in VR is even better. Thank you so much for making this app. The only I can't figure out is how to bring another piture in so that I can do a new puzzle. I learned that the Oculus Go is being discontinued. Could you create an Oculus Quest version of Jigsaw 360. I would appreciate that so much.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. To use your own photos, plug headset into your PC. Create a folder "360" under the Pictures folder, then copy photos inside /Pictures/360. Also check permissions for Jigsaw 360 via the more details button in your headset library to make sure it can access your storage to load the photos. There is already a Quest version of Jigsaw 360 at https://jumblivr.itch.io/jigsaw-360 but it requires SideLoading. Early next year Oculus will be making it easier to get games onto your Quest that have not been accepted into their store :)

reviews.review_description: This is one of my go-to games on the Go.
Such a calming and fun experience!
Great when I need to unwind! Add your own pics and make it even better!
Good controls, relaxing.  Very nice!
I love the jigsaw very calming and relaxing

reviews.review_title: Many Thanks for a Lovely App
reviews.review_description: Am enjoying this game. Relaxing, a good way to kill time. Took a while to get the hang of the controller to turn the pieces the right way, great once mastered! Great  job to the developers.
A game of this kind couldn’t have made better! Very, very nice for all ages! Thank yoi, well done!
Very relaxing game,love it.

I'd bought a Go determined not to buy any games. But this one caught my eye and I'm very glad it did! the clarity and the implementation are first-rate if there is any way to improve it I can't think what it is.
